package_name: 右上角更多面板内部操作保持打开与外部点击关闭
device_feedback: Changing options in the top-right More menu automatically closes the menu.
The requested behavior is to keep the More panel open during internal changes and close only on outside taps.

root_cause.reason: System Menu automatically dismisses after selecting an item, which conflicts with persistent low-frequency settings adjustment.

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -project /Users/sungning/Projects/SellerCamera/SellerCamera.xcodeproj -scheme SellerCamera -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

device_run.reason: No physical device execution was performed during report creation.

known_risks: The custom More overlay needs true-device validation for panel placement and outside-tap behavior.
When the More panel is open, tapping the shutter area closes the panel first instead of immediately capturing, to reduce accidental capture risk.
The import photo action opens the system photo picker; whether to close the More panel after import tap remains a product interaction decision.
